caption:
Travel tip✨ Use this one app to plan your next adventure abroad✈️

Here are 5 experiences I discovered with Fever App in Madrid:

1.Eonarium Flow-a magical immersive experience with luminous visuals and classical music 💫 

2.Avatar: The Experience-an immersive journey into the world of Pandora🌌
3.Royal Palace and Royal Collection Gallery-a stunning baroque complex with over 3,000 rooms 🏛️
4.Candlelight Concert-live music under thousands of candles🕯️
5.Dining experiences at Tragabuches and Botania-delicious meals in the cosiest atmospheres 🧑‍🍳

Find your next activity abroad with Fever via the link in bio 

🎁Get 10% off with code LONDONBY10 for Eonarium Flow and Avatar: The Experience @fever_uk
